findings.description: Footer content from PDF page 1 is repositioned into the body reading flow in the HTML, appearing between the officials' names/titles and the MEMORANDUM heading.
findings.evidence: PDF: Footer text ('State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Waste Management, 1646 Mail Service Center | 217 West Jones Street | Raleigh, North Carolina 27699-1646, 919 707 8200 T') appears at the bottom of page 1. HTML: This same text appears between 'MICHAEL SCOTT / Acting Director' and the 'MEMORANDUM' heading, disrupting the reading order.

findings.description: The handwritten signature image present on PDF page 1 (next to 'From: Larry Frost, Engineer') is missing from the HTML. This is a substantive image authenticating the memorandum.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows a handwritten signature between the 'From:' line and the digital signature block. No corresponding tag exists in the HTML for this signature.

findings.description: The digital signature certification block text is entirely omitted from the HTML. This block contains the signer's identity, email, and signing date — substantive authentication information.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 contains: 'Digitally signed by LYF / DN: cn=LYF, o=DWM, ou=SWS, / email=larry.frost@ncdenr.gov, / c=US / Date: 2016.05.12 12:11:52 / -04'00''. This text does not appear anywhere in the HTML.
